about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a Full Stack Developer with 2.5+ years of experience, specializing in backend development. My journey into software engineering started after earning a degree in Mechanical Engineering, driven by curiosity and a passion for building software. Today, I build scalable web applications using modern technologies and continuously expand my knowledge in system design, low-level design, and software architecture.

timeline.title: Continuous Learning
timeline.subtitle: Backend & System Design
timeline.description: Actively learning Low-Level Design, System Design, distributed systems, cloud technologies, and software architecture to build scalable and maintainable applications.

timeline.title: Full Stack Developer
timeline.subtitle: Current Organization
timeline.description: Working primarily on backend systems, scalable APIs, databases, and production-grade applications while collaborating in a monorepo architecture.

timeline.title: Software Engineer
timeline.subtitle: Quintype Technologies
timeline.description: Started my professional journey as a Full Stack Developer, building internal products, REST APIs, authentication systems, and working with PostgreSQL, Node.js, and React.

timeline.title: Transition to Software Development
timeline.subtitle: Self-Learning & MERN Stack
timeline.description: Learned JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, SQL, Git, and Data Structures & Algorithms through hands-on projects.

timeline.title: Bachelor's in Mechanical Engineering
timeline.subtitle: Graduated in Mechanical Engineering
timeline.description: Completed my engineering degree and developed an interest in software development.
